purpose: Q1 reviewer-proof claim audit for Practical Radiation Oncology target.
primary_supported_claims: Real patient-specific PROTEAS RTDOSE audit was completed.
Future-lesion coverage is incomplete for dose >=95% Rx, dose >=100% Rx, heat >=0.50 and heat >=0.80.
Heat >=0.50 has numerically broader coverage than dose >=95% Rx, but the cluster-bootstrap mean-delta CI crosses zero.
Fractionation-stratified patterns are exploratory because the 7-fraction stratum has only 9 patients.
blocked_claims: Toxicity benefit or local-control benefit is established.
Heat >=0.50 is statistically superior to dose >=95% Rx by cluster-bootstrap mean-delta inference.
The fractionation analysis proves causal superiority of hypofractionation.
